code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    # Calculate Bollinger Bands
    df['bb_upper'] = ta.volatility.bollinger_hband(df['close'], window=params['bb_window'], window_dev=params['bb_dev'])
    df['bb_lower'] = ta.volatility.bollinger_lband(df['close'], window=params['bb_window'], window_dev=params['bb_dev'])
    
    # Calculate RSI
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=params['rsi_window'])
    
    # Generate signals
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[(df['close'] > df['bb_upper']) & (df['rsi'] > params['rsi_upper'])] = -1
    signals[(df['close'] < df['bb_lower']) & (df['rsi'] < params['rsi_lower'])] = 1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: USD/CHF exhibits mean-reversion behavior where price extremes relative to Bollinger Bands combined with RSI overbought/oversold conditions signal high-probability reversals.
